hypothesis: Assigning 50% of the total cross-modal prediction loss to predicting the XRD latent from graph and text (and 25% each to the other two targets) during X-MoPA pretraining will yield at least a 10% relative MAE reduction on Matbench dielectric constant and bulk modulus tasks compared to uniform target weighting, by mitigating the model’s short-range bias through stronger long-range structural alignment.
